scripts.build:electron: pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run generate-icon && pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run build
scripts.package:mac: pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run generate-icon && pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run build && pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run package:mac
scripts.package:win: pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run generate-icon && pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run build && pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run package:win
scripts.package:linux: pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run generate-icon && pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run build && pnpm --filter openclaw-installation-assistant-electron run package:linux
